rules.rule: every reviewer override MUST be reviewer-attributed and cite the prior artifact_id.
overrides are append-only; the prior artifact remains intact and is not deleted.
reject overrides MUST cite at least one rule_id from MP-/SS-/XC-/PC-/PL-/PR-/PI-/PXL-/PRO-* tables.
autonomous overrides are FORBIDDEN; the runtime may PROPOSE packages and exports only.
